series_metadata.series_description: Reference copies of state and federal legislation of interest to an agency, including proposed legislation, regardless of whether the legislation was passed. Inclusive of working documents in the formulation or support/opposition to the legislation, correspondence, and any other related support documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
